fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 63. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 61.

suffering_zones: Peloton Pace Lock-In: Sustaining 18+ mph for 4 hours in humid Miami peloton demands steady threshold power from Brickell to Key Biscayne.
Florida Flat Fatigue: Endless flat miles through South Beach test mental grit without climbs to break rhythm.
Gala Endurance: Post-ride recovery at Mana Wynwood gala till late night challenges full-day fueling.

final_verdict.one_liner: Luxury charity peloton ride with pros through Miami's icons.

youtube_data.search_query: Best Buddies Challenge: Miami gran fondo cycling Miami

videos.title: Miami Prix Race 1 2-26-2023
videos.description: First El Hueco race of the season!  Officially the start of Miami Race Season.  Today's race covers Cat 4/5 with special guest footage from Jhony's camera of the final sprint.  As well as commentary on the P123 race.  Enjoy!

videos.title: 17-Year-Old Returns Woman’s Lost Purse and Gets $3K Reward
videos.description: A California teen did a good deed by driving to a woman’s house to return a lost purse. Melina Marquez says a teenager found the purse in a shopping cart at a grocery store. The driver’s license inside belonged to her friend, Eliana Martin, who used to live with her, but hadn’t updated her address. They posted the doorbell video to social media hoping to find the teen. Adrian Rodriguez, 17, reached out to identify himself as the good Samaritan. Inside Edition Digital’s Mara Montalbano has more.

videos.title: Don't Do This on Your Bowral Classic 2025 Grand Fondo
videos.description:
Welcome to my First ever Grand Fondo Cycling experience — the Bowral Classic 2025! 
🚴‍♂️ 150km, 2400vm of pain, laughter, and pure chaos. From getting dropped at the start line to getting lost and missing the final climb, this ride had everything: highs, lows, new friends, and unforgettable moments across the stunning Southern Highlands.

Expect real racing footage, raw emotions, plenty of laughs, and some honest reflections on what it’s like to tackle your first Gran Fondo in Australia.

If you love cycling vlogs, bike banter or just watching someone suffer beautifully on a bike, this one’s for you.

👉 Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more Aussie cycling adventures!

------------- C - H - A - P - T - E - R - S ------------
00:00 – Intro: My First Ever Bike Race at the Bowral Classic 2025 🚴‍♂️
01:16 – Start Line Nerves: Bowral Classic Begins!
02:50 – Murillo Parking Chaos & Pre-Race Laughs
03:22 – Riding Through the Beautiful Southern Highlands 🌄
04:00 – Finn + Epic Country Views on Course
04:28 – Oxley Climb #1 – The Pain Starts Early 😅
05:26 – Fernando Cooking Up Watts & Race Fuel Talk
05:45 – Pastries Cycling Club – New Kits, Same Energy 🥐
06:26 – Pit Stop #2 with JohnZ & Sami – Mid-Race Bonk Recovery
11:35 – Alex is Strong! The Group Pushes On 💪
14:35 – Mini Bike Moment – Brompton Madness
15:08 – Glenquarry Climb #2 – Grinding Through the 4km Ascent
15:51 – THE WALL – Brutal Final Climb Challenge ⛰️
17:35 – THE FAIL – Missed Turn & Disqualification Heartbreak 😭
18:40 – Finish Line Relief – Lessons Learned at Bowral Classic
19:38 – Pastries Cycling Club Highlights & Results 🏁
20:25 – CHEERS! Post-Race Celebration & Recovery Beer 🍻
20:40 – Best Day Ever Reflections – Was It Worth It?
21:40 – Like & Subscribe – More Aussie Cycling Vlogs Coming Soon!

-------------- L - I - N - K - S --------------
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/raydenggg/
Strava:  https://www.strava.com/athletes/102405391

Filmed on the  @insta360  X5

videos.title: FBI Agent Turns Tables on Disrespectful Cop
videos.description:
#bodycam #police 

A young police officer pulls over a federal agent, claiming he was swerving. Things take a tense turn as the officer, full of arrogance and disrespect, talks down to the Black federal agent—until he realizes who he’s dealing with. Watch the moment the cop’s confidence crumbles when he realizes he's in serious trouble!
tags: police officer pulls over fbi agent

videos.title: Tour of KC Gran Fondo promo
videos.description:
Building momentum and excitement for the First Annual Gran Fondo at the 2014 Tour of Kansas City. http://tourofkc.com/granfondo.html

What's a Gran Fondo? A challenging ride that combines the best elements of epic recreational rides and scenic touring rides with the color and flash of a great road race.

Ever envisioned yourself riding a stage of the Tour de France or Tour of Missouri? Rolling across the countryside with your teammates, crossing the finish line before a cheering crowd, seeing your finish time flash on the screen? That's the Gran Fondo experience...the thrill of riding a Grand Tour stage, now open to anyone.

Fondos attract the entire gamut of cyclists...from touring cyclists to long-distance aficionados to serious racers and roadies, to those who just enjoy a 15 mile Saturday jaunt. It attracts riders who are interested in the scenery, food and support that is a step above the ordinary, friendly competition and working for a personal best--or just enjoying the rural countryside with friends.

Huge thanks to our videographer Keith Walberg, who has shared his amazing footage of some of the other events around the country that have some of the elements we're looking to bring to the 2014 Tour of KC and First Annual TKC Gran Fondo.

Come on out June 21st and help us create a great bicycle ride and a great bicycle party tradition in Kansas City. 

More info or register: http://tourofkc.com/granfondo.html

key_challenges.name: First big climb
key_challenges.description: 1.3km climb at 10% average grade after 20 miles, only 40km into the 150km race with two more big ones at the end

key_challenges.name: Second last big climb
key_challenges.description: Almost 4km long climb that's not too bad until the end

terrain_notes.text: Rolling hills on beautiful country roads
So much elevation with continuous rolling hills

race_day_tips.text: Bring your full soft flask with 400g of sugar - rider forgot his and had to survive on free gels and sharing with other riders
Smash a caffeine gel at the halfway pit stop around 71km

additional_quotes.text: 400g of sugar in my soft flask. Left at home. So surviving on the free gels. Thanks Jackie for the remaining half of his soft flask as well cuz I was really bonking, man.

rider_intel.search_text: The Best Buddies Challenge Miami features challenging rolling hills throughout the 150km course on beautiful country roads. Riders face a significant early climb at 25 miles - a 1.3km ascent averaging 10% grade with two more big climbs later in the race. The second-to-last climb is almost 4km long and gets difficult toward the end. The terrain is described as continuous rolling hills with substantial elevation gain. Nutrition is critical with a pit stop at 71km where riders take caffeine gels. The course runs through scenic countryside that provides some mental relief from the physical suffering of the climbs.
